description: Playground-optimised patches for the Petstore API. Adds default examples so the Try-it flow works out of the box.

patches.description: Pre-fill 'status' with 'available' — the most common playground query.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Inventory status to filter by. The playground defaults to `available`. Use `pending` or `sold` to explore other states.

patches.description: Pre-fill username and password with demo credentials.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Sample username. Use `demo-user` for the public playground server.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Sample password. Use `demo-pass` for the public playground server.
